title: Customer Support Hours
content: Our customer support is available Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Contact us at support@engageafrica.io or call 012-345-6789.

title: Shipping Policy
content: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping available for R50 extra. Free shipping on orders over R500.

title: Return Policy
content: 30-day return policy on all products. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Contact returns@engageafrica.io for returns.

title: Payment Methods
content: We accept credit/debit cards, EFT, and cash on delivery. All payments are secure and processed through PayGate.

title: About Engage Africa
content: Engage Africa is a leading provider of health and wellness products in South Africa. We specialize in natural remedies, supplements, and personal care products. Founded in 2020, we're committed to providing quality products at affordable prices.

title: Product Quality
content: All our products are manufactured in GMP-certified facilities and undergo rigorous quality testing. We use only the finest natural ingredients sourced from local suppliers where possible.
